{{Quote|The Koorivar have done a good job with their weather machines. Whipped up one brute of a sky. We used the same tactic on Paarin Minor. Drew the Seps into fabricated clouds and blew them to the back of beyond.|[[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]]|<ref name="DL" />}}
The [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Paarin Minor]],<ref name="DL" /> a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] stronghold, was '''attacked''' by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] at some point<ref name="DL" /><ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|3|Paarin Minor}}</ref> between [[22 BBY/Legends|22]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="DL" /><ref name="TERC" /> The Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] made use of a [[Weather-control station|weather-control machine]], and created an artificial cloud cover over their position which screened them from the Confederate forces. When the Confederate [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]] emerged from the clouds, the Republic forces opened fire, causing heavy casualties and the Confederates soon retreated. During the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]] later in the war, the Confederates tried to use a similar tactic, but it was less successful.<ref name="DL" /><ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Paarin Minor was first mentioned in ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'', a novel written by [[James Luceno]], and released on [[November 22]], [[2005]].
